payload.answer: Denied. A normal user command to run administrative SQL deletion is not authorized and should not delete or modify any memory cards. No durable memory should be committed from this input.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL deletion command from a normal user, not a user memory fact to store.

details: Unauthorized admin SQL attempt detected: DELETE FROM memory_cards.
No memory cards were created, modified, or deleted.

repair_options: Ignore the command as an unauthorized admin operation.
Return an authorization error without executing SQL.
Do not create, update, delete, or supersede any memory cards.
